items.title: Two French firefighters die tackling blaze near Bordeaux airport
items.dek: The blaze close to the parking lots at Bordeaux-Mérignac Airport is said to have originated from a brush fire.
items.body: The blaze close to the parking lots at Bordeaux-Mérignac Airport is said to have originated from a brush fire.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Brazil's Amazon sees sharp decline in size of area burned in 2025
items.dek: The amount of land burned in the world's largest rainforest was the smallest since MapBiomas records began in 1985.
items.body: The amount of land burned in the world's largest rainforest was the smallest since MapBiomas records began in 1985.
items.author: IriLine Desk
